level.setting: The Abyssal Ruins of Orizon, a sunken crystalline city

pickup.name: Thermal Core
pickup.effect: Allows the user to melt hardened calcification

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton opens the sealed pressure gate to the Inner Sanctum

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Emits high-frequency vibrations that shatter brittle structures

encounters.trigger: Siren death shatters the barrier to the Temple Core

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Fragment
pickup.effect: Contains the weakness to the Deep-Sea Sovereign

encounters.trigger: The eel's retreat reveals the summoning circle for the boss

boss.name: Deep-Sea Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Use the fragment to disrupt the Sovereign's shield before finishing it with the Obsidian Scepter

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Deep from the ruins
level.reward: The ability to manipulate underwater geysers

pickup.name: Glowing Kelp
pickup.effect: Provides heat to thaw frozen obstacles

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab clears the path to the Shallow Reef

pickup.name: Enchanted Pearl
pickup.effect: Dazzles deep-sea predators

encounters.trigger: Clearing the jellyfish reveals the entrance to the Abyssal Chamber

pickup.name: Ancient Sunken Crown
pickup.effect: Grants control over deep-sea currents

encounters.trigger: The anglerfish flees, opening the path to the Sunken Throne

boss.name: Guardian Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Calm the beast using the crown to restore peace to the grotto

level.objective: Explore the Grotto and pacify the Guardian Leviathan
level.reward: Tamer of the Deep title and underwater breathing ability

level.setting: The Abyssal Necropolis, a sunken city filled with bio-luminescent kelp and decaying stone structures.

pickup.name: Vial of Void Essence
pickup.effect: Empowers necromancy spells to ignore armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry releases a ghostly key needed to open the flooded archives.

pickup.name: Ancient Runestone
pickup.effect: Resonates with oceanic vibrations to shatter crystalline structures

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the archivist's power activates the elevator to the Deep Throne.

pickup.name: Heart of the Depths
pickup.effect: Increases health regeneration

encounters.trigger: Killing the horror causes the temple to destabilize, leading to the final encounter.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Void
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Depths to anchor the Leviathan to the seafloor, allowing the scythe to deal a lethal blow.

level.objective: Cleanse the Abyssal Necropolis of its corruption and claim the throne.
level.reward: The Trident of the Abyss and mastery over deep-sea minions.

pickup.name: Conductive Gel
pickup.effect: Increases Lightning Trident shock radius

encounters.trigger: Opening the main lab doors

pickup.name: Thermal Battery
pickup.effect: Allows the trident to discharge molten heat

encounters.trigger: Overloading the core to unlock the spire

pickup.name: Obsidian Catalyst
pickup.effect: Stabilizes energy discharge for boss vulnerability

encounters.trigger: Activating the emergency beacon

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Obsidian Catalyst into the Leviathan's core while underwater pressure is vented

level.objective: Escape the research station before it implodes under crushing deep-sea pressure

pickup.name: Bio-luminescent Moss
pickup.effect: Temporarily illuminates dark areas

encounters.trigger: Opening the cargo bay triggers the alarm, drawing the next enemy from the darkness

pickup.name: Electrified Harpoon
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to metallic or conductive surfaces

encounters.trigger: Defeating the angler reveals a hidden path leading to the coolant valves

pickup.name: Overload Core
pickup.effect: Used to destabilize hydraulic armored plating

encounters.trigger: The drone's collapse initiates the emergency lockdown of the main boss gate

boss.name: Leviathan Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Successfully overload the guardian's armor plate using the core to expose its heart

level.objective: Deactivate the underwater facility's core before the structural integrity fails.

pickup.name: Magnesium Fuel Cell
pickup.effect: Increases heat generation of attacks

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a hull breach leading to the lower level

pickup.name: Titanium Alloy Wrench
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with heavy pressure valves

encounters.trigger: Overloading the mech activates the emergency bulkhead release

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Nullifies extreme temperatures for boss encounter

encounters.trigger: Shattering the guardian releases the access key to the Core Control Room

boss.name: Hydro-Core Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the reactor temperature before the complex implodes

level.objective: Prevent the reactor from melting down and causing a volcanic eruption

level.setting: The rusted, sunken ruins of the Deep-Sea Research Station OMEGA-9

encounters.hazard: Leaking hydraulic fluid causing slow movement

pickup.name: Thermal Battery
pickup.effect: Increases damage against cold-adapted biological entities

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the secondary bulkhead release

encounters.hazard: Flickering emergency strobe lights causing vision impairment

pickup.name: Superconducting Coil
pickup.effect: Allows charging of high-frequency sonar blasts

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the parasite short-circuits the door to the reactor room

encounters.hazard: Rising radiation levels drain health over time

pickup.name: Command Override Key
pickup.effect: Deactivates the boss's containment shielding

encounters.trigger: Killing the Cephalopod grants access to the Final Containment Tank

boss.name: The Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the Command Override Key to disable its shielding then strike the core

level.objective: Escape the facility by neutralizing the Leviathan Prime
level.reward: Access to the Deep-Ocean Surface Extraction Module

level.setting: The Bubble Reef Caverns, a glowing coral maze filled with harmless, singing jellyfish

encounters.hazard: Thick curtains of seaweed that slow movement

pickup.name: Glittering Pearl
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds enemies with reflected light

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab clears the path to the Glowing Grotto

encounters.hazard: Fast-moving bubble currents that push the player backwards

pickup.name: Prism Shell
pickup.effect: Amplifies illusion spells

encounters.trigger: Calming the seahorse causes a hidden door to the Coral Throne Room to manifest

encounters.hazard: Spiky coral patches that deal minor contact damage

pickup.name: Royal Trident Shard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber seal

encounters.trigger: Clearing the urchin grants the final key to face the Tide Master

boss.name: Tide Master Octo
boss.victory_condition: Use the shard to shatter the Octo's ink-bubble shield

level.objective: Restore harmony to the reef by calming the agitated sea creatures
level.reward: The title of Ocean Warden and a magical conch that plays soothing melodies

pickup.name: Ancient Fire-Resistant Resin
pickup.effect: Grants temporary immunity to flame-based damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the viper causes the bridge to collapse, plunging you into the Sunken Temple below.

pickup.name: Echoing Spirit Whistle
pickup.effect: Stuns spectral creatures for three seconds

encounters.trigger: The guardian dies, triggering a massive stone door to grind open to the forbidden nesting grounds.

pickup.name: Enchanted Bone Totem
pickup.effect: Nullifies boss-specific magical shields

encounters.trigger: The raptor’s screech summons the slumbering Titan Queen from her nest.

boss.name: Titan Queen Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the totem to strip her scales, then land a fatal strike with the Obsidian Claws.

level.objective: Slay the Titan Queen to restore balance to the chaotic jungle ecosystem.
level.reward: The Beastlord's Crown and mastery over local predator spirits.

level.setting: An ancient, fog-shrouded rainforest filled with overgrown stone ruins

pickup.name: Fire Arrowhead
pickup.effect: Grants incendiary damage to bow shots

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler clears the vines blocking the path to the inner ruins

pickup.name: Jaguar Tooth Charm
pickup.effect: Increases critical hit chance against mystical beasts

encounters.trigger: The death of the jaguar triggers a mechanism opening the temple vault

pickup.name: Ancient Sun Stone
pickup.effect: Emits intense light capable of breaking dark enchantments

encounters.trigger: The destruction of the construct reveals the path to the High Altar

boss.name: Void Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun Stone to blind the serpent, then strike its exposed core

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Forest from the High Altar
level.reward: The legendary Ranger's Mantle which grants permanent stealth in foliage

encounters.hazard: Crumbling wooden planks over a 100-foot chasm

pickup.name: Alchemical Solvent
pickup.effect: Corrodes biological armor plating

encounters.trigger: Killing the stalker sounds a horn, drawing the attention of the Swamp Guardian

encounters.hazard: Swirling toxic spores that drain health over time

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that stuns ancient stone constructs

encounters.trigger: Breaking the Altar triggers the collapse of the path leading to the inner sanctuary

pickup.name: King's Heart Crystal
pickup.effect: Vulnerable core item needed to destabilize the boss

encounters.trigger: Activating the Sentinel opens the final door to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: The Primal Entity
boss.victory_condition: Use the King's Heart Crystal to shatter the entity's protective shell and land a fatal strike with the Obsidian Dagger

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen idol from the heart of the jungle before the ritual is completed

level.setting: An ancient, sun-drenched canopy path lined with bioluminescent flora.

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Nectar
pickup.effect: Grants Radiant Energy infusion

encounters.trigger: Defeating the hound opens the passage to the Crystal Stream.

pickup.name: Ancient Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Forbidden Altar gate

encounters.trigger: Cleansing the serpent reveals the path to the Altar.

pickup.name: Essence Crystal
pickup.effect: Can disable Ancient machinery

encounters.trigger: The Guardian drops the ritual key required for the boss encounter.

boss.name: The Great Root Mother
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence Crystal to deactivate her thorns and strike the core.

level.objective: Restore balance to the jungle by purifying the Root Mother.
level.reward: The Warden's Mantle of Eternal Spring.

level.setting: The Whispering Canopy, a dense, fog-ridden rainforest where ancient ruins are overgrown with pulsating bioluminescent fungi.

pickup.name: Corpse-Candle Flame
pickup.effect: Ignites necrotic energy to burn through organic barriers.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals a hidden switch that disables the containment field of the next zone.

pickup.name: Cursed Obsidian Eye
pickup.effect: Allows the wearer to see through illusions and reveals structural weak points.

encounters.trigger: The Revenant drops a key shard that unlocks the entrance to the Forbidden Ziggurat.

pickup.name: Heart of the Jungle
pickup.effect: A pulsating gem that destabilizes unnatural life forces.

encounters.trigger: The Guardian dissipates to form a portal leading directly to the boss chamber.

boss.name: The Verdant Lich
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Heart of the Jungle into the Lich's core to strip its immortality and land the final blow.

level.objective: Purge the corruption from the jungle and reclaim the Forbidden Ziggurat.

level.setting: The Giggling Canopy, a vibrant forest where the trees hum soft melodies.

pickup.name: Super-Suds Potion
pickup.effect: Increases bubble viscosity

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Gopher opens the path to the Silver Stream.

pickup.name: Crystalized Nectar
pickup.effect: Hardens substances on contact

encounters.trigger: Capturing the dragonfly reveals a hidden bridge to the Ancient Oak.

pickup.name: Golden Sap
pickup.effect: Essential component for boss bait

encounters.trigger: Clearing the vines unveils the entrance to the Boss Altar.

boss.name: The Great Canopy Curator
boss.victory_condition: Feed the Curator the Golden Sap to calm their whimsical rage.

level.objective: Restore harmony to the forest by calming the agitated Guardian.
level.reward: The Master Alchemist's Eternal Effervescent Potion.

level.setting: A decaying rainforest where time flows erratically, covered in bioluminescent flora and thick, choking fog.

encounters.hazard: Erratic time loops that slow movement

pickup.name: Stasis Sand
pickup.effect: Freezes non-organic matter in place

encounters.trigger: Defeating the jaguar reveals a shimmering temporal rift leading deeper into the jungle.

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the gateway to the Heart of Time

encounters.trigger: Shattering the guardian releases a pulse of light that marks the path to the temple center.

encounters.hazard: Eerie shadow patches that drain health

pickup.name: Eternal Hourglass
pickup.effect: Increases damage against temporal anomalies

encounters.trigger: Banishing the scout causes the altar to rotate, opening the final boss chamber.

boss.name: Chronos-Eater Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Eternal Hourglass to stabilize the Serpent's time flow, making it vulnerable to standard attacks.

level.objective: Traverse the jungle and defeat the Chronos-Eater Serpent to restore the natural flow of time.
level.reward: The Chronomancer's Mantle, which grants immunity to temporal slowdown effects.

level.setting: An overgrown, decaying ruin filled with thick fog and carnivorous flora.

encounters.hazard: Toxic spores that drain health over time.

pickup.name: Sun-Dried Herb
pickup.effect: Restores 30 health and provides temporary immunity to toxins.

encounters.trigger: Killing the tracker reveals a hidden passage leading to the deep thicket.

encounters.hazard: Swinging vine traps that cause stun.

pickup.name: Ceremonial Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapon for extra fire damage.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the viper unlocks the gateway to the Ancient Altar.

encounters.hazard: Cracking ground that causes fall damage.

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Key
pickup.effect: Required to open the final chamber door to the boss.

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the key summons the Jungle Overlord to the Altar.

boss.name: Jungle Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the relic to shatter the Overlord's protective bark armor before landing the final strike with the Obsidian Greataxe.

level.objective: Traverse the ruins to slay the source of the rot.
level.reward: The Heart of the Jungle, granting permanent berserker fury.
